id.description: Stable slug matching the JSON filename stem (no path or extension).

short_description.description: Catalogue description for list and detail summary; need not be brief (UI label: Description).

parent_dataset_id.description: Slug of the parent dataset when this entry is a derivative.

derivative_note.description: What changed relative to the parent dataset; required when parent_dataset_id is set.

storage_on_server.description: When false, the dataset is catalogued but files are not on group storage; internal_storage_path must be omitted.

internal_storage_path.description: Canonical path on the group storage server when storage_on_server is true or omitted; see docs/metadata_guidelines.md.

modality.description: One or more imaging modalities in this dataset.

anatomy.description: Deprecated legacy free-text field; prefer anatomy_tags and body_regions. Omit on new entries.

body_regions.description: Broad anatomical regions for filter accuracy (controlled vocabulary).

anatomy_tags.description: Optional normalized organ or structure tags, e.g. liver, lung, brain.

primary_tumor_location.description: Optional primary tumor location for oncology datasets.

task.description: One or more research tasks this dataset supports.

annotation_types.description: Optional annotation representation hints used for research filtering.

ai_generated_labels.description: True when any annotations were produced by an AI model rather than a human annotator.

download_status.description: Whether raw data is present on group storage.

field_of_view.description: Anatomical coverage of each acquisition (e.g. whole body, thorax only).

is_longitudinal.description: True when the dataset includes repeated scans or follow-up timepoints per subject.

phase.description: Optional contrast or acquisition phase (e.g. arterial, portal venous) or clinical trial phase label.

main_disease_type.description: Optional primary disease or condition focus (e.g. hepatocellular carcinoma, COPD).

license.description: Licence identifier or short name; non-secret.

access_notes.description: How to obtain access or caveats; no secrets or credentials.

original_authors.description: Creators of the upstream or external resource (distinct from catalogue created_by).

bibtex_citation.description: Full BibTeX or bibliography string for citing the upstream source.

upstream_url.description: Canonical download or project page for the upstream dataset (http or https).

created_by.description: Group member id, email handle, or ORCID URI per local convention.

created_by_user_id.description: Supabase Auth user id of the creator, stamped by the server for ownership checks.

created_by_email.description: Verified Supabase account email of the creator, stamped by the server.
